title: Event
description: A CDP event envelope. All events share this structure. The data field contains a snapshot of the relevant resource at the time of the event.

event_type.description: Stable event type string (e.g. transaction.captured). See schemas/enums/event-types.json for all values.

event_version.description: Schema version of this event shape.

api_version.description: API version active when this event was generated.

occurred_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the event occurred.

resource_type.description: The resource type this event is about.

resource_id.description: The ID of the resource this event is about.

data.description: A snapshot of the resource at the time of the event.

provenance.description: Provenance links from the resource, if applicable.

request_context.description: Request context from the API call that triggered this event, if available.
